name: gtm-skills
description: 203 production go-to-market playbooks for AI agents across 25 categories. Framework-cited GTM skills for Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Hermes, Windsurf, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Copilot, Zed, VS Code, and Goose.
author: LeadMagic

scripts.build: node scripts/generate-indexes.js && node scripts/generate-pitfalls-index.js && python3 scripts/generate-skills-lock.py
scripts.check:generated: npm run build && git diff --exit-code -- AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md README.md taxonomy.csv skills.lock references/pitfalls-index.md references/skill-index-master.md .claude-plugin/plugin.json .claude-plugin/marketplace.json
scripts.check: node scripts/validate-skills.js && python3 scripts/audit-references.py && python3 scripts/generate-skills-lock.py --check && python3 scripts/install-tui.py --target cursor --project /tmp/gtm-skills-install-test --dry-run && python3 scripts/public-repo-audit.py
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run check:generated
